assertionResults.fullName: Security and Hardening Tests (e2e) 1. Authentication Tests should return 401 when accessing protected route without token
assertionResults.title: should return 401 when accessing protected route without token

assertionResults.fullName: Security and Hardening Tests (e2e) 1. Authentication Tests should return 401 when accessing protected route with an expired token
assertionResults.title: should return 401 when accessing protected route with an expired token

assertionResults.fullName: Security and Hardening Tests (e2e) 1. Authentication Tests should return 401 when token has an invalid signature (tampered)
assertionResults.title: should return 401 when token has an invalid signature (tampered)

assertionResults.fullName: Security and Hardening Tests (e2e) 1. Authentication Tests should return 401 if refresh token is reused or invalid
assertionResults.title: should return 401 if refresh token is reused or invalid

assertionResults.fullName: Security and Hardening Tests (e2e) 1. Authentication Tests should return 429 Too Many Requests after 5 failed login attempts
assertionResults.title: should return 429 Too Many Requests after 5 failed login attempts

assertionResults.title: should forbid reading an unauthorized chat
